achievements.title: This seems familiar...
achievements.description: Choose your starting Digimon

achievements.title: One step at a time
achievements.description: Become a Bronze Rank Tamer

achievements.description: Become a Silver Rank Tamer

achievements.title: Tamer with a Heart of Gold
achievements.description: Become a Gold Rank Tamer

achievements.title: We're in the end game now
achievements.description: Become a Platinum Rank Tamer

achievements.title: The best around!
achievements.description: Beat the game and become the Tamer King
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Ultimate Partners
achievements.description: Finish the game without Digi-Converting a single Digimon
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: They are stronger than they look!
achievements.description: Beat the Digi-Arena with only Koromon, Tanemon and Tsunomon in your team
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Chronomon's True Form
achievements.description: Defeat ChronomonHM and obtain its data
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Fight of the Holy Birds
achievements.description: Defeat ChronomonHM with only Varodurumon in your party.
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: I won't allow it!
achievements.description: Defeat Belphemon and stop the Demon Lords
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Leave it to me!
achievements.description: Defeat Belphemon with only RiseGreymon, MachGaogamon and Lilamon in your team
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Easy Mode Unlocked
achievements.description: Input all 3 Passwords in the Password Machine
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Caritative Soul
achievements.description: Finish all 57 available Quests
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Wait, I can't complete this?
achievements.description: Find the Quest that can't be completed without Digi-Matching

achievements.title: Digimon Researcher
achievements.description: Get all 223 available Digimon
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Gotta get all them points
achievements.description: Collect all Tamer Point Rewards from Mr. Gure (Except the one for having 999,999 Points)

achievements.title: Honorable Tamer
achievements.description: Get 999,999 Tamer Points and collect the last reward from Mr. Gure

achievements.title: In search of Treasure
achievements.description: Open all Treasure Chests available for Normal Rank Tamers

achievements.title: The more Treasures the better
achievements.description: Open all Treasure Chests only available after becoming a Bronze Rank Tamer

achievements.title: Treasure Hunter
achievements.description: Open all Treasure Chests only available after becoming a Silver Rank Tamer

achievements.description: Open all Treasure Chests only available after becoming a Gold Rank Tamer

achievements.title: No Chest left unopened
achievements.description: Open all Treasure Chests only available after becoming a Platinum Rank Tamer

achievements.title: Treasures for a King!
achievements.description: Open all Treasure Chests only available after becoming the Tamer King
